description: Indic TTS voice coverage model card. Language → voice mapping is authoritative for SpeechInterface.supportedLanguages; aspirational languages are forbidden.

fallbackPolicy.unsupportedBcp47: Route to fallbackLanguage; emit telemetry outcome=fallback and usedFallback=true. Never throw when fallback is declared. Never silently substitute English without that signal.
fallbackPolicy.mixedScript: Devanagari+Latin (and other mixed-script) input synthesizes on the effective voice without crash; language selection still follows requested BCP-47 with declared fallback — it does not auto-switch mid-utterance.
